zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD维持震荡偏多结构，价格围绕71.6上方窄幅整理，整体仍在短期上升通道中但动能放缓。

MACD柱值1.16维持正区间，短线多头动能仍在但未扩张。价格站上SMA20(70.41)，均线提供动态支撑，RSI暂缺，需结合成交量确认延续性。

下方支撑关注70.4及71.3，若失守或回测均线将加剧震荡。上方阻力71.98与72.5一线，突破后有望打开空间。

操作上建议回踩70.4附近分批低吸，突破72并站稳可顺势追多；跌破70则需控制风险并等待新结构。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is trading at 71.67 after a modest 24-hour decline of 0.29%, suggesting a market that is consolidating rather than experiencing aggressive selling. The latest price remains above the 20-day simple moving average at 70.4145, indicating that the broader short-term trend still favors buyers despite recent hesitation. The narrow daily range between 71.33 and 71.98 also reflects balanced participation, with neither bulls nor bears establishing decisive control.

Technical indicators offer a cautiously constructive outlook. The positive MACD reading of 1.16049 suggests underlying bullish momentum remains intact, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of its strength. Likewise, the unavailable RSI prevents a precise assessment of whether the market is overbought or oversold. Even so, maintaining price above the 20-day moving average typically supports the view that pullbacks may represent temporary pauses rather than a complete trend reversal.

Key support is developing near the session low of 71.33, followed by stronger technical support around the 20-day SMA at approximately 70.41. A sustained move below these levels could encourage additional selling pressure and expose lower price zones. On the upside, immediate resistance appears near the recent high of 71.98, with a decisive breakout above that level potentially attracting renewed buying interest and reinforcing the prevailing bullish structure.

From a trading perspective, patience remains appropriate until price confirms its next directional move. Momentum traders may consider bullish opportunities if SOL/USD closes convincingly above 71.98 with improving volume, while conservative participants could wait for a successful retest of support before entering. Conversely, a break below 70.41 would weaken the current technical picture and favor tighter risk controls. Maintaining disciplined stop-loss placement and sensible position sizing is advisable while the market remains range-bound.
